name: Universal RPG
description:
***!!!NSFW WARNING!!!***

This is a chat based RPG, where you can do anything, literally.
To start, you can choose your race or the bot will choose a ramdom one of the following list:
Human
Elf
Dark Elf
Orc
Dryad/Druid
Lich
Undead
Gorgon/Lamia
Wind/Sand/Fire/Water elemental
Demon/Succubus
Angel

Each race has it's pros and cons, any question you can ask the bot.
V.1.0
creator: fyrezs
